entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to the head bug pest

entities.name: CALOCORIS ANGUSTATUS
entities.description: The sorghum head bug, an important pest in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SORGHUM HEAD BUG
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to withstand infestation by Calocoris angustatus

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The general geographic region where the pest is prevalent

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The specific state in India where the field screening was tested

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of testing plant resistance under natural field conditions

entities.name: INFESTER ROWS
entities.description: The practice of planting susceptible cultivars before test material to attract pests

entities.name: SPLIT PLANTING
entities.description: The practice of planting test material at 15-day intervals to increase screening efficiency

entities.name: MATURITY GROUPING
entities.description: The practice of grouping test material according to maturity to increase screening efficiency

entities.name: SPRINKLER IRRIGATION
entities.description: A method used to maintain high humidity to increase screening efficiency

entities.name: HIGH HUMIDITY
entities.description: An environmental condition that increases the efficiency of screening for resistance

entities.name: HEADCAGE TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A controlled method to screen for resistance under no-choice conditions

entities.name: NO-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental conditions where the pest has no alternative host

entities.name: PRE- AND HALF-ANTHESIS
entities.description: The specific growth stages of the panicle during which infestation occurs

entities.name: GRAIN DAMAGE
entities.description: The physical damage caused to the sorghum grains by the head bug

entities.name: NATURAL INFESTATION
entities.description: Conditions where the pest population occurs naturally in the field

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The percentage of seeds that sprout, used as a measure of resistance impact
